site.title: International Accessibility Task Force (Ji̱ wecmuɔ̱ɔ̱n tin la̱t kɛ kui̱i̱ kä ɣöö dëë cop thi̱n)
site.tagline: Kä min go̱o̱r nɛy diaal ɣöö bi̱ kɛ cop thi̱n ɛ jɛn duɔ̱ɔ̱p in görkɛ.
nav.label: Mi̱ di̱i̱t
skip.toContent: Räth ni kä tin ca gɔ̱r
meta.home.description: IATF cuɛ go̱o̱ri̱ thuɔ̱ɔ̱k kä ɣöö bi̱kɛ cop thi̱n gɛr rɛy gua̱th tɔ̱wä kuakni̱ tin ŋa̱ckɛ ɛ nɛy diaal.
meta.projects.description: Guic lät tin ca ka̱m raar ɛ IATF kɛ kui̱i̱ lätni̱ tin dëë jek ɛ nɛy diaal.
meta.propose.description: Thiec IATF kɛ duɔ̱ɔ̱p mi̱ dee ji̱ luäk kɛ ɣöö bi̱ rɔ kulɛ cop thi̱n kɛ rɛy intɛrnɛt, rɛy i-meili̱, kiɛ rɛy gua̱th mi̱ cɔali̱ Discord.
meta.governance.description: Kuënɛ jɛ i̱di̱ ɛn IATF nhɔkɛ pröjekni̱, guirɛ gua̱th tɔ̱ɔ̱wä ŋɔaani̱, kɛnɛ ɣöö jakɛ la̱t kä ŋa̱ckɛ ɛ nɛy diaal.
meta.join.description: Duɔ̱ɔ̱p in deri̱ rɔɔdu mat thi̱n kä IATF: gɔ̱a̱ri̱kɛ kɔd, luɔ̱ckɛ, ɣɔ̱nkɛ, kiɛ titkɛ pröjek.
meta.accessibility.description: Kä IATF go̱o̱rɛ ɣöö ba gua̱a̱th ɛmɛ kulɛ gaŋ i̱di̱ kɛnɛ duɔ̱ɔ̱p in dëë lar kɛ kui̱i̱dɛ.
meta.transparency.description: Gua̱th tɔ̱ɔ̱cä IATF: ŋuɔ̱t, pröjekni̱, kɛnɛ läri̱ tin pay la̱t tin caa la̱th thi̱n ni̱ wal.
actions.emailProjects: Ja̱k wargakni ti ci ben kɛ imei̱l
registry.empty.title: Thilɛ pröjekni̱ ti̱ ca ka̱mraar
registry.empty.body: IATF ɛ mi̱ riali̱kä pröjek thɛtdɛ min nhiam kä nɛy diaal.
proposal.form.title: Ja̱k thiecä
proposal.form.body: Thi̱i̱cni̱ ta̱a̱ la̱t in te piny ɛmɛ kɛ ɣöö bi̱ thiec ja̱k kä IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript go̱o̱rɛ ɣöö ba la̱t kɛ jɛn web puɔrm ɛmɛ. Mi̱ /cɛ te thi̱n, la̱tdɛ kɛɛ i̱mpuɔl kiɛ Dithkɔrdi̱ kɛ gua̱a̱dɛ.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Luɔ̱k läri rɛy gua̱th ɛmɛ /ka̱nɛ kɔn riali̱kä. Formɛn ɛmɛ bɛ ji̱ lɛp i̱mɛlɛ̈ɛ̈l kɛ gua̱a̱dɛ.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Ca riali̱kä kɛ kui̱i̱ kä ɣöö bi̱ kɛ wɔ̱ piny...
proposal.form.ready: Mi̱ ci̱ i̱thki̱e̱r ja̱k, bi̱ IATF duɔ̱ɔ̱r mi̱ caa kuëŋ thi̱n ka̱m ji̱ kɛ gua̱a̱thdɛ.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Läthni wargak kɛ ɣöö /ca bi ja̱k.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Kä ga̱ŋ i̱thpäm cɛ thuɔ̱k kɛ gua̱a̱thdɛ. Ku lɛ nyɔk kɛ guic ɛ nyɔk ɛ ŋot /ka̱nɛ ni ja̱k.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Thiɛlɛ mi̱ ca luäŋ kɛ thëm kɛ kui̱ ga̱ŋ i̱thpäm rɛy gua̱th ɛ thi̱a̱k ɛmɛ. Ɣɔ̱ɔ̱n, ɣɔ̱n nyɔk.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Ci̱ gua̱a̱th la̱t kɛ kui̱ ga̱ŋ i̱thpäm thuuk. Ɣɔ̱ɔ̱n, ɣɔ̱n nyɔk kɛ guäc.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Ji̱n läri jɛ ɛ gɔaa ɛn ɣöö bi duɔ̱ɔ̱r la̱th thi̱n ɛ /ka̱n jäk.
proposal.form.success: Ca thiecdu jek kä ca tɔ̱w kɛ ɣöö ba nyɔk kɛ guic.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Mi wi̱i̱ rɔ nyɔk kɛ ruac kɛ IATF kɛ kui̱ thiecä ɛmɛ, läri jɛ rɛy warɛgakä min ca la̱th piny.
proposal.form.successLinkLabel: Open intake record (buɔ̱n in caa ka̱m raar)
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Tëë kɛ riɛk mi̱ ci̱ tuɔɔk gua̱a̱th in ja̱ki̱ warɛgak thi̱n. Ɣɔ̱ɔ̱n, ɣɔ̱ni̱ jɛ nyɔk. Mi̱ ŋot riɛk, läri email gua̱thdɛ.
project.detail.eyebrow: Kuenɛ kɛ naath kɛ kui̱i̱ la̱t
project.detail.problemTitle: Ɛ riɛk in mith ca riali̱kä ɛ la̱t ɛmɛ?
project.detail.whyTitle: Ɛŋu la̱tkɛ pröjek ɛmɛ thi̱n ɔ
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Kä thok Liŋli̱thni̱ ɛ thi̱a̱k, luɔ̱ɔ̱tni̱ dɔ̱ŋ bi̱kɛ kulɛ mat thi̱n kɛ kɔrɛ
footer.label: Kuen gua̱th in la̱tkɛ thi̱n
footer.licenseContent: Ta̱a̱ in te thi̱n CC BY-SA 4.0
footer.blurb: Ɛn la̱t kɛ kui̱i̱ kä ɣöö bi̱ naath cop thi̱n derɛ thia̱k ɛn ɣöö dëë jɛ tok, dëë jɛ ka̱m raar kɛ duɔ̱ɔ̱p mi̱ thi̱a̱k, kä dëë jɛ kuëŋ thok nath.
footer.source: Kuenɛ kɛ ɣöö bi̱ nɛy ti̱ ŋuan cop thi̱n: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Lät ti̱ caa la̱t ɛ nɛy tin lät kɛ tɛknɔlɔji̱ ti̱ luäk naath.
contact.label: Ruac kɛ naath
project.status.seeking-maintainer: Go̱ri̱ ram mi̱ bi̱ ji̱ luäk
translation.label: Ta̱a̱ luɔ̱ɔ̱tni̱
translation.source: Ɛn thok Liŋli̱e̱th ɛ jɛn thok in caa ka̱m raar rɛy warɛgakni̱ ti̱ti̱.
translation.humanReviewed: Ɛn luɔc ɛmɛ caa guic ɛ ram mi ŋäc ruac a gɔaa.
translation.machineAssisted: Ɛn luɔc ɛmɛ caa jɛ luäk ɛ makanɛ kä /ka̱nɛ ni̱ nyɔk kɛ guic ɛ ram mi̱ ku lɛ ruac agɔaa.
translation.needsUpdate: Ɛn luɔc ɛmɛ cuaa nyɔk kɛ guic ɛ ŋot /kenɛ ni̱ cop thok Liŋli̱thni̱, kä dɔ̱ŋ derɛ go̱r ni̱ ɣöö derɛ nyɔk kɛ guec.
translation.report: Läätni̱ luɔ̱ɔ̱tni̱ kɛ kui̱ rikni̱: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Ɛŋu mi ca la̱r ji̱?
